scripts.build: npm install --prefix frontend-react && npm run build --prefix frontend-react && powershell -Command "if (Test-Path 'backend-spring\src\main\resources\static') { Remove-Item 'backend-spring\src\main\resources\static' -Recurse -Force }" && mkdir backend-spring\src\main\resources\static && xcopy frontend-react\build backend-spring\src\main\resources\static /E /I /Y && cd backend-spring && mvn clean package -DskipTests
